name: Jason Liu
shortBio: Covers airport arrivals, high-speed rail, app setup, payments, booking mechanics, and the practical basics that make the trip function.
fullBio: Jason Liu is the transport and payments editor at China Travel Notes. He leads coverage on airport arrivals, rail decisions, local transport, travel apps, payment setup, booking steps, and other practical mechanics that often decide whether the rest of the trip feels easy or stressful.
reviewProcess: Jason reviews pages for procedural clarity, booking accuracy, app logic, transport realism, and whether a practical how-to can be followed by a first-time visitor without unnecessary ambiguity.
seoDescription: Read transport, payments, and booking-basics coverage by Jason Liu at China Travel Notes.
